title: Oscars Ratings Hit 17.9 Million Viewers, Down 9% From Last Year and Lowest Since 2022
summary: The 98th annual Academy Awards drew 17.86 million viewers on ABC and Hulu, which makes it the least-watched Oscars telecast since 2022.
